name: Logs in the Render Dashboard
snippet: Want to stream logs to your observability provider? See Streaming Render Service Logs . View, search, and filter your service's runtime logs from its Logs ...

name: Streaming Render Service Logs
snippet: You can stream the logs generated by your Render services to any logging provider with a TLS-enabled syslog endpoint , such as Datadog or Sumo Logic.

name: Deploying on Render
snippet:
Render can automatically deploy your application each time you merge a change to your codebase: High-level auto-deploy steps.
Send a POST request to the Render API's Trigger Deploy endpoint. This endpoint accepts optional body parameters for clearing the service's build cache and/or deploying a specific commit.

name: Deploying APIs on Render: A Step-by-Step Guide | by 0x7c4
